purpose: Machine-readable implementation tracker and active work queue.

domains.summary: Restructure governance into root context docs plus .agents contracts and execution JSON.

tasks.title: Replace root AGENTS.md with compact manifest
acceptance: Root AGENTS.md lists governance map.
Root AGENTS.md defines source-of-truth order.
Root AGENTS.md avoids duplicating full implementation rules.

tasks.title: Move durable Markdown governance into context directory
acceptance: context/docs contains architecture, PRD, and design-system docs.
context/instructions contains Codex implementation instructions.
Old .agents/docs and .agents/instructions references are removed or replaced.

tasks.title: Create three-contract YAML set
acceptance: .agents/contracts/product.yaml exists.
.agents/contracts/design.yaml exists.
.agents/contracts/validation.yaml exists.
The contracts parse as YAML.

domains.summary: Removed platform payment-method setup, readiness state, CTA, and dashboard/customer blockers.

tasks.title: Update governance to remove platform payment-method setup
acceptance: PRD omits platform payment-method setup.
Architecture limits platform Customers to protocol-fee Checkout.
Product contract forbids platform payment-method setup.

tasks.title: Update code to remove readiness gate
acceptance: Dashboard has no platform payment-method blocker or CTA.
Customer accept/claim flow has no platform payment-method readiness state.
Merchant Connect readiness still gates new-Vouch creation.
Tests are updated for the new readiness rule.

domains.summary: Add durable design-system governance and prepare token migration.

tasks.title: Add design-system governance doc and contract
acceptance: context/docs/design-system.md defines token strategy and component inventory.
.agents/contracts/design.yaml defines token, component, CSS, and accessibility constraints.
Inline style policy is explicit.

tasks.title: Plan CSS variable and component token migration
acceptance: globals.css is inspected.
components.json CSS variable setting is inspected.
Inline styles and arbitrary literals are inventoried where relevant.
Token migration is scoped separately from readiness gate removal.

tasks.title: Audit component ownership and centralized content
acceptance: Active components do not import feature orchestration.
User-facing component copy is mapped from content modules.
Duplicate and multi-responsibility component bundles are removed.

domains.summary: Define validation gates and later run narrow validation when implementation begins.

tasks.title: Add validation contract
acceptance: .agents/contracts/validation.yaml defines command policy.
Validation scopes are mapped to task types.
Execution JSON update rules are defined.

tasks.title: Run narrow governance validation after files are applied
acceptance: JSON files parse.
YAML files parse.
Manifest paths exist.
Stale governance paths are removed or intentionally retained with explanation.
